data.name: attentionwords
data.value: Improperly assigning devices can cause system instability. Please proceed with caution.

data.name: DdaService_SetShutdownToTurnOff
data.value: Change VM shutdown action to Hard Turn Off...

data.name: cpucache
data.value: Enable virtual machines to manage CPU cache...

data.name: reboot
data.value: Changing the language will restart the application

data.name: servererror
data.value: The host system is not a server version, and the virtual machine with the PCIe Passthrough device added will not be able to start!

data.name: Error_ExportLocalRegistryInfoFailed
data.value: Error: Failed to export local registry information.

data.name: Error_OfflineLoadVmRegistryFailed
data.value: Error: Failed to load the virtual machine registry offline. Please ensure the program is run with administrator privileges.

data.name: Error_NvidiaRegistryProcessingException
data.value: Error: An exception occurred while processing the NVIDIA registry: {0}

data.name: Error_CannotGetVmInfo
data.value: Failed to get virtual machine information.

data.name: Warning_LowMmioSpace_ConfirmExpand
data.value:
The MMIO space for virtual machine '{0}' is currently {1}GB, which is below the recommended 64GB.
This may prevent the graphics card from acquiring enough memory space.
Do you want to shut down the virtual machine and expand its MMIO space to 64GB?

data.name: Error_GetNetworkInfoFailed
data.value: Failed to get network information. Please ensure the program is run with administrator privileges and the Hyper-V module is installed.

data.name: Error_ExternalSwitchRequiresPhysicalAdapter
data.value: A physical network adapter must be specified for an external switch.

data.name: AddSwitch_Validation_NoAdaptersForExternalOrNat
data.value: Cannot create an External or NAT switch because no physical network adapters are available.

data.name: AddSwitch_Validation_AdapterRequiredForExternalOrNat
data.value: An External or NAT switch must have a physical network adapter selected.

data.name: AddSwitch_Validation_OnlyOneNatAllowed
data.value: The system allows only one user-created NAT network.

data.name: Warning_CannotModifyDefaultSwitch
data.value: This is a default switch and its settings cannot be modified.

data.name: Info_NoSwitchesFound
data.value:
No Hyper-V virtual switches were found.
Please ensure the Hyper-V feature is installed and running.

data.name: Error_OnlyOneNatNetworkAllowed
data.value:
Operation failed: Only one NAT network is allowed.
The existing NAT switch is: '{0}'

data.name: Error_PhysicalAdapterInUse
data.value: Operation failed: The physical network adapter '{0}' is already in use by the switch '{1}'.

data.name: Error_UpdateSwitchConfigFailed
data.value: Failed to update configuration for switch '{0}': {1}

data.name: Error_EmbeddedWpfResourceNotFound
data.value: Could not find the embedded WPF resource.

data.name: Error_CheckForUpdateFailed
data.value: Failed to check for updates. Please check your network connection.

data.name: Info_AlreadyLatestVersion
data.value: You are already using the latest version.

data.name: CheckBox_InstallGraphicsDrivers
data.value: Install OpenGL/Vulkan graphics drivers (Need more time)

data.name: Info_UseProxyForGitHub
data.value: If you cannot connect directly to GitHub.com, please use a stable and reliable proxy.

data.name: Validation_ProxyIpAndPortMismatch
data.value: Proxy IP and Port must be either both filled or both empty.

data.name: LegacySystemCompatibility
data.value: Limit CPU features for legacy OS compatibility

data.name: Status_Msg_RestartNow
data.value: System identifier modified. Restart now to apply changes?

data.name: Error_Gpu_DiskNotFound
data.value: Cannot dismount disk: Disk not found in VM config.

data.name: Error_Gpu_BitLocker
data.value: Target partition is BitLocker protected. Please disable BitLocker first.

data.name: Error_Gpu_InvalidSystemPart
data.value: Installation aborted: ({0}) is not a valid system partition.

data.name: Msg_Gpu_RemountSuccess
data.value: Physical disk successfully remounted to VM.

data.name: Error_Gpu_NoPartition
data.value: This GPU does not support partitioning.

data.name: Msg_Gpu_LinuxWaitingIp
data.value: Waiting for VM network readiness and IP...

data.name: Error_Gpu_SshTimeout
data.value: SSH connection timed out. Check VM networking.

data.name: Error_Net_ConfigObject
data.value: Failed to locate config object or create template.

data.name: Error_Cpu_ConfigNotFound
data.value: VM or Processor config not found.

data.name: Error_Host_EnableFail
data.value: Failed to enable Hyper-V. Please enable manually in Windows Features.

data.name: Msg_Cpu_RootNotice
data.value: Root scheduler mode: affinity saved and will apply on next start.

data.name: Error_Cpu_ApplyFail
data.value: Cannot apply settings. Check HCS permissions.

data.name: Error_Storage_PhysicalMod
data.value: Passthrough disks cannot be modified. Remove and re-add.

data.name: Error_Storage_VhdRunning
data.value: Cannot change VHD while VM is running. Please shut down.

data.name: Error_Storage_Occupied
data.value: Slot is occupied. Select another one.

data.name: Error_Storage_IsoSource
data.value: Source folder required for ISO creation.

data.name: Error_Storage_IsoPath
data.value: Save path required for ISO creation.

data.name: Error_Storage_Gen1Dvd
data.value: Gen1 VM DVD cannot be added while running (IDE no hot-swap).

data.name: Error_Storage_Gen1IdeFull
data.value: Gen1 IDE controller is full. Cannot add DVD.

data.name: Error_Storage_NoScsiRunning
data.value: No available SCSI slots while VM is running.

data.name: Error_Storage_NoSlots
data.value: This VM has no available storage slots.

data.name: Error_Gpu_RemoveFail
data.value: Failed to remove GPU partition. Check permissions.

data.name: Error_Gpu_NoPartFound
data.value: No valid partitions found. Ensure OS is installed.

data.name: Msg_Gpu_DetectWin
data.value: Single Windows partition detected. Syncing drivers...

data.name: Msg_Gpu_ManualSelect
data.value: Please select the OS partition manually...

data.name: Msg_Gpu_LinuxVm
data.value: Linux partition detected. Waiting for VM to start...

data.name: Error_Gpu_IpManual
data.value: Failed to auto-get IP. Enter manually.

data.name: Desc_NumaSpan
data.value: VMs can allocate memory across physical nodes

data.name: Desc_UnlockHard
data.value: Fix issues caused by hardware security checks

data.name: Desc_SwitchServer
data.value: Magic Tweak (Not available for Pro/Home/Ent editions)

data.name: Desc_Pcie
data.value: Assign physical GPUs and devices directly to VMs

data.name: Label_SelectVmStart
data.value: Select a VM from the left list to start

data.name: Label_SelectCores
data.value: Select host cores to bind (drag to multi-select)

data.name: Error_VerNotSupport
data.value: Current config version does not support this.

data.name: Warn_VmOffRequired
data.value: Shut down VM to change this setting.

data.name: Desc_HideHypervisor
data.value: Hides virtualization flags, helps bypass detection.

data.name: Desc_ExposeMsr
data.value: Allows guest to read true CPU frequency.

data.name: Desc_SocketTopo
data.value: Maps physical socket topology to guest.

data.name: Desc_CpuAffinity
data.value: Configure VM affinity to physical cores.

data.name: Desc_Sriov
data.value: Highest performance (Requires SR-IOV support on switch and host NIC)

data.name: Desc_Vmq
data.value: Reduces CPU overhead via DMA to VM memory.

data.name: Desc_Ipsec
data.value: Reduces CPU load and improves throughput.

data.name: Desc_MacSpoof
data.value: Allows guest to change source MAC.

data.name: Warn_DynRamRunning
data.value: Cannot change startup RAM while running with Dynamic Memory.

data.name: Desc_RamPageSize
data.value: Select physical page size for VM memory.

data.name: VmPage_SelectConfigDir
data.value: Select Virtual Machine Configuration File Directory

data.name: VmPage_SelectNewVhdPath
data.value: Select Location to Save New Virtual Hard Disk

data.name: VmPage_NameEmpty
data.value: Virtual machine name cannot be empty

data.name: VmPage_SelectVhdSave
data.value: Please select a save location for the new hard disk

data.name: VmPage_SelectExistVhdPath
data.value: Please select an existing virtual hard disk file (.vhdx)

data.name: VmPage_ExistVhdNotFound
data.value: The specified existing virtual hard disk file does not exist. Please check the path.

data.name: VmPage_IsoNotFound
data.value: The specified ISO image file does not exist

data.name: VmPage_VmCreated
data.value: Virtual machine {0} has been successfully created and configured.

data.name: Xaml_CreateWithoutDisk
data.value: The virtual machine will be created without a virtual hard disk. You can add one manually later.

data.name: Xaml_Placeholder_NewVhdxLoc
data.value: Select location for the new .vhdx file

data.name: DiskParser_LogErrGptNotFound
data.value: [DiskParser] Error: GPT signature not found at 512 or 4096 offset

data.name: HyperVScheduler_LogBcdeditFail
data.value: [HyperVSchedulerService] Failed to execute bcdedit via Utils.RunScriptSTA: {0}

data.name: VmMemoryService_ErrReadConfig
data.value: Critical exception occurred while reading memory config: {0}

data.name: ProcessAffinity_LogVmmemAcquireFail
data.value: [ProcessAffinityManager] Found matching vmmem process (PID: {0}) but failed to acquire: {1}

data.name: ProcessAffinity_LogVmmemQueryFail
data.value: [ProcessAffinityManager] WMI query for vmmem process failed: {0}

data.name: ProcessAffinity_LogGetAffinityFail
data.value: [ProcessAffinityManager] Failed to get affinity for process {0}: {1}

data.name: ConsoleViewModel_EnterFullScreenHint
data.value: Entering full screen, press Ctrl+Alt+Break to exit

data.name: ConsoleViewModel_LogSendCadActivated
data.value: [VM] SendCadCommand activated, preparing to trigger event...

data.name: HostPageViewModel_DisableFailed
data.value: Disable failed. Please try manually or check permissions.

data.name: HostPageViewModel_DisableSuccess
data.value: Hyper-V disabled successfully. Reboot required to take effect.

data.name: VmPage_TitlePermanentDelete
data.value: [Affinity] Apply failed ({0}/5): {1} - Process not ready or no permission

data.name: VmPage_MemGranLargePage
data.value: [DEBUG-STORAGE] Location reset after manual switch to: {0}

data.name: VmPage_MemGranHugePage
data.value: Please check deployment scheme and Host IP

data.name: VmPage_MemGranAutoAssign2
data.value: [User Reset] Unfinished GPU partitioning detected, rolling back...

data.name: VmPage_MemTrackDisable
data.value: You can re-select the GPU or modify parameters

data.name: MainPage_UsbPassthroughDesc
data.value: Assign host USB devices to VMs

data.name: USBPage_DriverNoticeDesc
data.value: USB passthrough requires pre-installed drivers and agents. Read the guide for details.

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_ErrWormholeAlreadyExists
data.value: A wormhole already exists in the current spacetime. Please close the existing wormhole before opening a new one, or a spacetime paradox will occur.

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_ErrParentChainNode
data.value: This node is a parent-chain node of the current spacetime. Opening a wormhole would cause a spacetime paradox.

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_ErrOnlySnapshotNode
data.value: Wormholes can only be opened on snapshot nodes.

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_ErrNodeHasWormhole
data.value: This node already has an active wormhole.

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_ErrCannotDetermineDiskDir
data.value: Unable to determine the disk directory.

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_ErrCreateDiffDiskFailed
data.value: Failed to create temporary differencing disk: {0}

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_ErrNoActiveWormhole
data.value: This node has no active wormhole.

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_MsgWormholeClosed
data.value: Wormhole closed. Timeline restored to normal.

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_ErrOnlyHistoricalNode
data.value: Can only travel to historical snapshot points.

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_MsgTravelSucceeded
data.value: Travel succeeded. VM has returned to the specified spacetime point (powered off).

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_ErrOriginCurrentNoAnnihilate
data.value: Origin and current nodes cannot be annihilated.

data.name: VmSpacetimeService_ErrOriginCurrentNoConverge
data.value: Origin and current nodes cannot be converged.

data.name: VmPage_MsgDiskReclaimOk
data.value: About to permanently delete "{0}", including all virtual hard disk files and the configuration directory.\n\n⚠️ Please confirm there are no other files in the VM configuration directory. This action cannot be undone!

data.name: VmPage_MsgRollbackComplete
data.value: [VM-LOG] UI triggered save, current preview order: {0}

data.name: VmPage_MsgParallelUniverse2
data.value: Parallel Universe: Create a new VM instance based on this spacetime

data.name: VmPage_MsgSpacetimeConverged2
data.value: Spacetime converged to the previous node

data.name: VmPage_MsgProcessReset2
data.value: Process reset. Please re-select the GPU.

data.name: VmCpuSettings_WarnVmOffRequired
data.value: This operation requires the VM to be powered off.

data.name: VmRAMSettings_DescMemMappingMode
data.value: Configure how VM memory maps to host physical resources

data.name: VmRAMSettings_DescMemAccessMonitor
data.value: Configure read/write monitoring state and page resolution level

data.name: VmRAMSettings_DescSgxComputing
data.value: Enable hardware-level isolated secure execution environment on the processor

data.name: VmRAMSettings_DescSgxAuthMode
data.value: Configure launch authorization and runtime verification mode for secure enclaves

data.name: VmRAMSettings_DescSgxMemSize
data.value: Total physically isolated memory allocated for confidential computing (unit: MB)

data.name: VmRAMSettings_DescNumaBlockLimit
data.value: Manually limit the maximum number of memory blocks observable by a single virtual NUMA node

data.name: VmRAMSettings_DescDynMemStep
data.value: Minimum step unit when adjusting dynamically allocated memory

data.name: VmRAMSettings_DescCxlExtension
data.value: Enable high-speed bus interconnect protocol support or force physical address locking

data.name: Error_Net_TemplateNotFound
data.value: Failed to get network adapter template

data.name: Status_Msg_RestartRequired
data.value: A restart is required before making further changes.
